customManagers.description: Track the pinned mesh-llm release (ARG MESHLLM_VERSION) — the Dockerfile manager only sees the FROM base image, not the curl'd GitHub release.

packageRules.description: Pin Python to 3.12 — the ML training target (CUDA 13.1 / RTX 3500 Ada, see ml/unsloth/requirements.txt). CI must mirror that runtime, so never auto-bump the python version.
Stay on Node.js 24.x — package.json engines is >=24.0.0 <25.0.0 and the preinstall guard rejects v25+. Block major node bumps.
Stay on nvidia/cuda 13.x for the meshllm docker base image (docker/Dockerfile.meshllm-cuda, currently 13.3.0; ML target is CUDA 13.1 per ml/unsloth/requirements.txt) — block major bumps to v14.
